MIUI-Theme.author: Hyper 14
MIUI-Theme.title: Waterfall
MIUI-Theme.description:
A simple personalized theme for HyperOS / MIUI.
Main changes: • Added lunar calendar support • Customized wallpapers • Modified battery icon • Redesigned home screen clock widget
This is a beginner practice project focused on basic UI customization and learning HyperOS theme structure.
Compatible with HyperOS 1/2 and some MIUI versions. Certain elements may vary depending on device and ROM version.
Thanks for using and supporting beginner theme developers 💙
